title: OpenAI Authorization Failed due to Organization ID mismatch
symptom: When trying to use the OpenAI Message A Model node, a '401 - Authorization failed' error occurs, indicating an issue with the organization header.
applies_when: Using OpenAI Message A Model node
API key is confirmed to be correct
not_this_if: API key is for a personal account without an organization
root_cause: The error occurs because the API key is associated with an organization, but the Organization ID field in the credentials contains incorrect information. Specifically, if the Organization ID includes 'Project Key' text, it will lead to authorization failures.
fix_steps: Open the OpenAI credentials settings in n8n
Remove any 'Project Key' text from the Organization ID
Save the changes and retry connecting to the OpenAI model
agent_instruction: Remove 'Project Key' from the Organization ID in the OpenAI credentials and save.
